description: DNS records for madebysoupy.dev zone. Sync with: npm run sync:dns

records.name: apps
records.comment: Plot Generator app (GitHub Pages), protected by site-auth worker

records.name: opencode
records.comment: OpenCode IDE, protected by site-auth worker. Origin: opencode-origin.madebysoupy.dev

records.name: opencode-origin
records.comment: Cloudflare Tunnel origin for OpenCode (internal, not directly accessible)

records.name: opencode-ws
records.comment: Direct WebSocket tunnel endpoint for OpenCode — used by site-auth Worker for WS upgrades

records.name: mac.opencode
records.comment: OpenCode IDE on Mac Mini — served by ollama-home tunnel. No Access policy (cross-origin fetch incompatible with Access cookies).

records.name: llm
records.comment: Ollama LLM API via Cloudflare Tunnel, protected by Access
Root domain placeholder — update when ready

records.name: test-plots
records.comment: Test env: Plot Generator static site (GitHub Pages)

records.name: test-apps
records.comment: Test env: Plot Generator app, protected by site-auth-test worker

records.name: test-opencode
records.comment: Test env: OpenCode IDE placeholder — intercepted by site-auth-test worker route

records.name: test-llm
records.comment: Test env: Ollama LLM API via ollama-home tunnel, protected by Access

records.name: test-llm-api
records.comment: Test env: LLM API proxy worker endpoint
